source_basis: No new trace-family programs were added in E1a; this lane re-indexes existing M4/R1 evidence only.
the organic-trace milestone reuses the current broadened M4-E batch instead of silently re-running an equivalent suite under a new name.

helps_here: Decomposition still recovers many streams at the horizon where single-head first fails.
unproven_here: Current-suite rows still do not support universal horizon/base robustness claims.
unsupported_here: No E1a output broadens beyond current validated families.
